items.title: UEFA dismiss Barcelona missed red card appeal
items.summary: UEFA have ruled Barcelona's complaint over the refereeing in last week's Champions League quarterfinal loss to Atlético Madrid as "inadmissible."
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: IPL 2026: Chennai Super Kings set a target of 193 for Kolkata Knight Riders
items.summary: Chennai Super Kings are playing the same XI while Kolkata Knight Riders brought in Varun Chakravarthy in place of Saini
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Will LSG unleash 'match-ready' Mayank against RCB?
items.summary: The LSG fast bowler is finally good to go, after building up his workload on the sidelines during the early weeks of IPL 2026
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
